case_title: FARZANA CHOUDHERY ET AL VS. KATHLEEN OBRIEN-PENN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-19-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OBRIEN-PENN, KATHLEEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOUDHERY, FARZANA CHOUDHERY, MUBASHER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OBRIEN-PENN, KATHLEEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
